news.summary: Nokia Corporation (NOK) shares are down in premarket trading as the company announces the release of its latest fiber-optic LAN solution, Aurelis Optical LAN. This new solution is designed to meet the evolving connectivity needs of businesses, offering a future-proof option with fiber's durability, high performance, and efficiency for both in-building and campus environments. Optical LAN technology presents a significant advancement, reducing cabling needs by up to 70% and power consumption by 40% compared to traditional copper-based networks. With the potential to cut Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) by up to 50%, Optical LAN is seen as a cost-effective choice. For more detailed information, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Nokia introduces Aurelis Optical LAN, fiber-optic LAN solution with up to 70% less cabling and 40% less power usage. TCO may decrease by up to 50%.

news.summary: For the first time, Judi Health introduces the Unified Claims Processing™ platform, providing a seamless pharmacy and medical benefit experience for health plan sponsors and members. This initiative was launched in New York on May 8, 2025. Capital Rx, Inc., the enterprise health technology company and benefit administrator, is spearheading this advancement.
news.headline: Judi Health™ wins Best Healthcare InsurTech Solution in the 9th MedTech Breakthrough Awards, offering Unified Claims Processing™ for health plans.

news.summary: In Hamilton, New Jersey on May 8, 2025, Integrated Analytical Solutions (IAS), a leading provider of analytical testing services, unveiled its new cannabis testing facility in the area. This laboratory aims to enhance safety, quality, and transparency in the cannabis industry.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025 in Orlando, Florida, Northern Jet shared that Melanie Jones has been named as the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) of the company. This decision is seen as pivotal for Northern Jet as it aims for further expansion. With more than twenty years of experience in financial management, Melanie Jones is expected to bring valuable expertise to the executive team.
news.headline: Northern Jet names Melanie Jones as CFO, boosting leadership team amid strategic growth. Melanie has 20 years of financial experience.

news.summary: Cardio Diagnostics Holdings, based in Chicago, made public the implementation of a 1-for-30 reverse stock split for its common stock. This action will come into effect as of the market opening on May 13, 2025.
news.headline: Cardio Diagnostics Holdings, Inc. to implement 1-for-30 reverse stock split on May 13, 2025.

news.summary: A company based in Cincinnati has been acknowledged for fostering a supportive environment for young professionals to thrive in their career development and achievements. The business services leader has been commended for providing valuable support to emerging professionals in the industry.

news.summary: Investors Title Company (Nasdaq: ITIC) based in Chapel Hill, N.C., released its first-quarter results for 2025. The company disclosed a net income of $3.2 million, equivalent to $1.67 per diluted share. This is a decrease from the previous year's $4.5 million, or $2.40 per diluted share. Revenues saw a 5.8% rise, reaching $56.6 million compared to $53.5 million for the same period in the prior year. The revenue boost was mainly driven by a 15.3% surge in net premiums written.
news.headline: Investors Title Co. Q1 2025: Net income $3.2M, EPS $1.67 (↓26%). Revenues up 5.8% to $56.6M. Premiums ↑15.3%.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in Raleigh, North Carolina, Doktorconnect, a company specializing in preventative healthcare, revealed their acquisition of VitalFlo, a platform centered on proactive respiratory care technology. This move signifies Doktorconnect's shift from a traditional focus on treating illness to a more preventive approach in healthcare.
news.headline: Doktorconnect acquires VitalFlo for proactive respiratory care solutions, shifting to preventative care.

news.summary: Participants in various categories of the upcoming film competition include Adebowale "Debo" Adedayo, Juri Ueno, and Miyuki Fukuma in the Live Action Competition, with Shunji Iwai, Sandrine Faucher Cassidy, and Satoshi Jimbo in the Asia International and Japan categories. Additionally, Tao Okamoto is part of the Animation Competition lineup. This diverse selection of talents promises an exciting lineup for the event, showcasing a mix of international and Japanese creators.
news.headline: Judges for SSFF & ASIA 2025 Competitions announced: Debo Adedayo, Juri Ueno, Shunji Iwai among others.

news.summary: Denver, CO - May 8, 2025 - Colorado Commercial & Residential Painting, located in Denver, has recently received the prestigious 2025 Guildmaster Award from GuildQuality for their outstanding service. This award comes as a recognition for their excellence in service. The company has shown consistent dedication to their customers since 2005, earning them this esteemed award. GuildQuality, a reputable organization, has acknowledged Colorado Commercial & Residential Painting for their commitment to providing exceptional service.
news.headline: Colorado Commercial & Residential Painting wins 2025 Guildmaster Award for service excellence. Company based in Denver.

news.summary: A recent report by National Business Capital has identified Louisiana, Colorado, and Mississippi as the states least prepared for an upcoming recession. The report, released on May 8, 2025, highlights the increasing concerns about a potential economic downturn. Louisiana, Colorado, and Mississippi scored lowest in terms of recession readiness, raising questions about their ability to weather financial challenges. This assessment underscores the urgent need for these states to bolster their economic resilience. The report's findings serve as a stark reminder of the looming economic uncertainties facing these regions.
news.headline: 10 states, including Louisiana, Colorado, and Mississippi, are ranked lowest for recession readiness in 2025. - National Business Capital.

news.summary: A recent integration has bolstered remote patient monitoring services, allowing healthcare providers to enhance patient care and operational effectiveness in Rochester, N.Y. On May 8, 2025, EmmiTec.Health, a top player in Remote Patient Monitoring solutions, announced this development. The integration is set to significantly impact the industry, offering healthcare providers valuable tools to improve care. This update signifies a key milestone for EmmiTec.Health, showcasing their commitment to advancing remote patient monitoring services.
news.headline: EmmiTec.Health joins PointClickCare Marketplace to enhance remote patient monitoring solutions for healthcare providers.  ROCHESTER, N.Y., May 8, 2025 /PRNewswire.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Hilltop Residential revealed the establishment of a new arm, Hilltop Residential Development, focused on constructing top-tier multifamily communities in rapidly expanding urban areas. Hilltop Residential, a well-known real estate investment and management firm, aims to bolster its portfolio with this initiative. The division's primary objective is to build high-quality residential complexes from the ground up. This strategic move showcases the company's commitment to catering to the escalating demand for premium living spaces.
news.headline: Hilltop Residential launches new division for multifamily development, led by Eric Overton in Houston.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in Dallas, Pledge Software introduced the Nonprofit Check Plus API on its Pactman.org platform. The API offers advanced nonprofit compliance tools for developers and fintech companies. This new product is designed to enhance efficiency and effectiveness in monitoring compliance for nonprofits.
news.headline: Pledge Software unveils Nonprofit Check Plus API on Pactman.org to enhance nonprofit verification.

news.summary: Tineco, a renowned brand specializing in innovative home appliances, has recently introduced the FLOOR ONE S7 Stretch Ultra. Building on the success of the popular Stretch S6, this new model boasts a longer runtime and features an innovative DualBlock design to prevent tangling. In addition, it comes equipped with enhanced self-cleaning capabilities for added convenience. The launch of the FLOOR ONE S7 has generated significant excitement, showcasing Tineco's commitment to delivering high-quality products that cater to the evolving needs of consumers.
news.headline: Tineco launches Floor One S7 Stretch Ultra with longer runtime, dual-block anti-tangle design. Improves on Stretch S6.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in San Francisco, the jinIX Foundation organized a significant event to celebrate the inauguration of its non-profit project and to recognize the contributions of Nathan Ehrlich, a powerful advocate for rare diseases. Ehrlich's bravery and innovative thinking are driving advancements in the field.
news.headline: jinIX Foundation celebrated launch of non-profit initiative, honoring advocate Nathan Ehrlich for rare disease research mission.

news.headline: Access Ready Strategic partners with disability organizations to advocate for policy changes.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in Toronto, the Mircom Group of Companies, a prominent player in intelligent building solutions worldwide, introduced Mircom Cloud Services. This new offering is a full suite aimed at improving access control, security, and operational management for residential purposes.
news.headline: Mircom Group launches Mircom Cloud Services to enhance building operations worldwide.

news.summary: A video demonstrates SENTI-202's mechanism of action (MoA), which is designed to target and eliminate AML blasts and leukemic stem cells (LSCs) while safeguarding healthy hematopoietic stem cells/ hematopoietic stem and progenitor cells (HSC/HSPCs). This is achieved through a unique CD33 OR FLT3 NOT EMCN Logic-Gated gene circuit utilized by SENTI-202, highlighting its ability to selectively eradicate harmful cells while preserving crucial healthy cells.
news.headline: Senti Bio's video shows MoA of SENTI-202: targets AML cells, protects healthy stem cells.

news.summary: AI technology is being integrated into the Sweat app's crypto rewards system, rewarding users for their physical activity with cryptocurrency tokens. The app, which facilitates payments based on the number of steps taken by individuals, is expanding its token to other blockchain networks.
news.headline: 'Sweat' app, rewarding steps with crypto, now integrates AI as tokens spread to more blockchains in expansion.

news.summary: ALX Oncology Holdings Inc. is advancing a pipeline of novel cancer therapies. They reported financial results for Q1 2025, with cash, cash equivalents, and investments at $107.0 million, sufficient for operations into Q4 2026. They received FDA clearance for EGFR-targeted antibody-drug conjugate ALX2004, initiating Phase 1 trials in mid-2025. The company will not pursue U.S. registration in gastric cancer but is focused on clinical programs in breast and colorectal cancers. Milestones are expected in 2026 for these programs. The company has extended its cash runway and plans clinical milestones for breast cancer, colorectal cancer, and ALX2004 in the near future.
news.headline: ALX Oncology reports Q1 2025 financial results, extending cash runway to Q4 2026, focusing on evorpacept and ALX2004 studies, with $107.0 million in cash.

news.summary: MDU Resources Group, Inc. reported record first quarter earnings with a 13.9% increase in pipeline segment earnings and an 11.5% increase in natural gas distribution earnings. The company affirmed its 2025 guidance with earnings per share expected to be in the range of $0.88 to $0.98. The electric segment earned $15.0 million, down from $17.9 million in 2024, while the natural gas distribution segment earned $44.7 million, up from $40.1 million. The pipeline segment reported earnings of $17.2 million, up from $15.1 million in 2024. MDU Resources is transitioning to a fully regulated energy delivery company and remains focused on executing its long-term growth plan. Regulatory activities and customer growth are expected to drive continued performance. The company will discuss its first quarter results during a webcast and is focused on delivering value through its CORE strategy.
news.headline: MDU Resources reports strong Q1 2025: Net income $82.0M, EPS $0.40. Pipeline earnings up 13.9%, nat gas distribution up 11.5%.confirming guidance: EPS $0.88-$0.98. Transitioning to regulated energy delivery. Regulatory updates in multiple states for electric, gas segments. Segment earnings: Electric- $15.0M, down 16%, Nat Gas Dist - $44.7M, up 11.5%, Pipeline - $17.2M, up 13.9%. Various projects in pipeline segment. Full-year EPS guided between $0.88-$0.98. Conference call scheduled. MDU Resources Group, Inc. aims to deliver value through CORE strategy.

news.summary: In a significant development, the widely popular travel show Raw Travel TV by AIM Tell-A-Vision® Group (AIM TV) has secured renewals in key markets across 95% of the United States. The producers disclosed that the show's renewal spans over 179 cities, affirming its continued success and viewership. This renewal marks the path for more exciting and unfiltered adventures to be showcased in the upcoming season.
news.headline: Raw Travel TV season 13 (2025-26) approved with renewals in 95% of U.S. markets, promising more adventures in 179 cities.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, ABI Research, a leading global technology intelligence company, recognized eight satellite operators as "Hot Tech Innovators" in the satellite IoT sector. These operators have significantly advanced the satellite IoT industry through their groundbreaking contributions.
news.headline: ABI Research names 8 top satellite operators as "Hot Tech Innovators" in IoT market, including Globalstar, Iridium, EchoStar Mobile.

news.summary: BioDlink celebrates Junshi Biosciences' achievement of obtaining IND approval from China's NMPA for JS212, the company's inaugural bispecific ADC. JS212 merges dual-targeting antibody technology with a cytotoxic payload, marking a significant advancement in therapeutics. This milestone underscores the collaboration between BioDlink and Junshi Biosciences, highlighting the promising future of this innovative treatment.
news.headline: BioDlink celebrates Junshi Biosciences' IND approval of JS212, a bispecific ADC candidate, advancing new dual-targeting antibody tech in China; represents a next-generation therapeutic.

news.summary: The Ocean Park Apartments preservation project in NYC ensures the continued availability of essential affordable housing in a neighborhood with limited supply and high potential for residents. Tredway, a developer specializing in affordable and mixed-income housing, is leading the initiative. This effort is crucial in maintaining affordability amidst rising real estate prices and scarcity of housing options. The project safeguards a significant number of homes for individuals and families in need of economical housing solutions, contributing to the overall stability of the community.
news.headline: Tredway secures Ocean Park Apartments in Far Rockaway, Queens, preserving affordable housing in NYC. - MAY 8, 2025

news.summary: Recently released data, featured in JMIR, highlights the effectiveness of tailored messages promoting flu vaccinations among Dario members living with diabetes. The study showcases how personalized messaging significantly motivates individuals to get vaccinated. DarioHealth Corp. (NASDAQ: DRIO), a prominent player in the worldwide digital health sector, announced these findings from New York on May 8, 2025. This underscores the crucial role of targeted communication in healthcare, potentially improving vaccination rates and overall public health.
news.headline: New study shows personalized messaging from DarioHealth increased flu vaccine awareness in high-risk groups.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Zoomd Technologies Ltd. (TSX.V: ZOMD), a leading player in mobile-centric performance marketing globally, shared its excitement about sponsoring and joining MAU Vegas 2025. MAU Vegas is the top conference for mobile app expansion and marketing, scheduled for May.
news.headline: Zoomd will sponsor and present at MAU Vegas 2025, a key mobile app growth conference. TSX.V: ZOMD.

news.summary: Autobooks is set to receive a significant funding boost, enabling the company to broaden its market reach, strengthen its financial technology solutions, and back its growth strategies. The investment comes from Runway Growth Capital LLC, a prominent provider of growth loans based in MENLO PARK, Calif. The funding announcement was made on May 8, 2025, according to information released via PRNewswire. This financial support is crucial for Autobooks as it aims to capitalize on market opportunities and accelerate its expansion plans.
news.headline: Runway invests $40M in Autobooks for strategic growth & acquire Allied Payment Network. Expands market presence.

news.summary: Lori Tierney, with extensive expertise and experience, joins ACTO to propel the life sciences sector towards an AI-focused future. The company revealed on May 8, 2025, that they've gained a valuable addition. ACTO, known for its Intelligent Field Excellence (IFE) platform powered by AI for life sciences, is set to benefit from Tierney's leadership. This news comes as a significant development for ACTO, marking a strategic move to stay at the forefront of industry innovation.
news.headline: Former J&J President, Lori Tierney, joins ACTO's Board of Directors to drive AI advancements in life sciences industry.

news.summary: Starwood Capital Group has revealed plans to extend its $30 billion real asset credit platform to the insurance sector. The announcement was made in Miami Beach, Florida on May 8, 2025. Rob Allard has been appointed as the Chief Investment Officer for Starwood Insurance Strategies in light of this new development.
news.headline: Starwood Capital appoints Rob Allard as CIO of Starwood Insurance Strategies, plans to open $30B platform to insurance industry.

news.summary: Metamagnetics Inc., a rapidly expanding defense technology startup, recently unveiled a new product line specifically tailored for applications within aerospace and defense systems. This innovative line showcases a groundbreaking design feature, setting it apart from competitors by being entirely constructed without the use of rare-earth magnets. The company, based in MARLBOROUGH, Mass., made this announcement on May 8, 2025. This move marks a significant advancement within the industry, providing enhanced solutions without relying on rare-earth materials.
news.headline: Metamagnetics launches self-biased circulators for aerospace/defense systems without rare-earth magnets.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in Oklahoma City, the Board of Trustees of ETF Series Solutions announced the closure and liquidation of the Range Cancer Therapeutics ETF. This decision was made following a recommendation from Exchange Traded Concepts, LLC, the investment adviser to the fund. The liquidation process will commence immediately.
news.headline: Range Cancer Therapeutics ETF to be closed and liquidated by Exchange Traded Concepts due to Board's decision.

news.summary: In Southlake, Texas, on May 8, 2025, Sabre Corporation (NASDAQ: SABR), a prominent international travel technology firm, disclosed the selection of Jennifer Catto as Executive Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer. Jennifer is set to join Sabre's Executive Leadership Team, bringing her expertise to the company as it forges ahead in the industry.
